dd.top-text: Starting this January, grand winners of our month-long tournaments will get to drive a range of Aston Martin cars*!
dd.forth: Expert tutoring and the Aston Martin driving experience
dd.more: Learn more about this amazing opportunity
dd.orange: Will you be the next one to get behind the wheel of an Aston Martin?
dd.warn: Please note: in case the grand winner declines the prize or is for whatever reason unable to go on the trip, the prize is then forfeited in favor of the person next in line of prize distribution.
